'''Stigrit Krax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Troob]], the wife of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Krax]] and the mother of [[Ket Krax]]. She tried to sabotage Counselor [[Harthan]]'s attempts to mediate a truce between the Troobs and [[Hobor]]s by deliberately misinterpreting what the Hobor delegate said, and then by buying [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] from Harthan once the droid was called in to negotiate.

==Behind the scenes==
"Stigrit" is misspelled "Sigrit" once in ''The Protocol Offensive''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
